title: Loop-A-on-L2: firewall-preserving microstructure research loop (L2 regime dossiers + hypothesizer/DA adaptation + autonomous ticks)
source: CEO directive 2026-06-19 (interrupted /pm-day): 'now that we have L2 data for crypto and L2 data from the hackathon, run research and hypothesize Loop As on them.' PM surfaced the factual correction (we hold hackathon FX/metal SYNTHETIC L2 + crypto OHLCV-not-depth; no real crypto L2 ladders) and the ratified NO-GO caveat; CEO chose the FULL Loop-A-on-L2 build option over (a) a bounded research arc on data-we-have or (b) a Tardis-funded real-crypto OSR test, accepting the heaviest lift + synthetic-venue wall.
why: Existing Loop A is BAR-regime-driven (trend x vol taxonomy from OHLCV) behind a lookahead firewall; its hypothesizer never sees raw data/L2. The CEO wants the autonomous research loop extended to ingest MICROSTRUCTURE regime dossiers built from L2 (OFI/microprice/depth-imbalance/VPIN-proxy/spread/overshoot state per the 2026-06-11 OSR methodology survey), then run hypothesizer->devils-advocate->preflight ticks on them, preserving the firewall (no raw ticks, no dates, no asset name to the hypothesizer).
value_rationale: Value is RESEARCH + Best-Tech narrative (an AI research loop run over genuine microstructure data, honest negatives reported), NOT a live-deployable leg. Bandwidth exists: the critical-path Stage-2 instrument (B0197) is build-complete; only launch-day operator gates remain.
scope: DESIGN-FIRST (this epic's first phase): (a) quant-phd-advisor methodology = the L2 microstructure regime taxonomy + firewall-preserving dossier statistics + how the hypothesizer reasons about a microstructure regime without leaking raw data; (b) architect/Explore code-map = how to reuse loop_a_tick.py + the phase5 agents + the regime-dossier builder + proposal schema, and the existing L2 tooling (pipeline/l2_adapter.py, scripts/screen_alphas_101_l2.py, pipeline/tardis_adapter.py).

DATA REALITY the design MUST confront: hackathon L2 = FX/metals only, synthetic xSyphon pricer, ~27 days (2026-05-11..06-10), quotes-only, NO crypto, NO traded volume; crypto = Binance 1m OHLCV (NOT depth). So microstructure dossiers are FX/metals-real on a 27-day window (same event-scarcity that starved B0184) and crypto would be OHLCV-derived proxies only. The design states this honestly and decides the honest granularity (likely M15-ish microstructure bars).

BUILD (after the spec): an L2 regime-dossier builder (microstructure regime stats per asset/cell), an L2 variant of the Loop A tick, and the firewall-preserving hypothesizer/DA prompts; TDD to the phase5 standard; lookahead firewall adversarially enforced (custom L2 features are NOT auto-trusted).
RUN autonomous L2 ticks (LRU over microstructure cells), record to a Loop-A-style state + daily report.
recommendation: Spec-first/TDD. Phase 1 (this iteration): dispatch quant-phd-advisor (methodology) + an architect Plan/Explore (code-reuse map) in parallel; synthesize into a spec next; then split into TDD build tasks. Keep the synthetic-venue / event-scarcity caveats load-bearing in every artifact (honest-negative is itself the Best-Tech asset). Must NOT jeopardize the Jun-21 22:00 BST launch readiness.
out_of_scope: Any claim that an L2/microstructure edge is LIVE-DEPLOYABLE for this tournament (B0188 depth-parity-FALSE: the live MT5 venue is a synthetic ladder). Buying Tardis real crypto L2 (CEO did not choose that option). Changing the survival book or the B0197 Stage-2 instrument.

history.reason: DESIGN PHASE done (spec docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-19-loop-a-on-l2-microstructure-design.md). quant-phd-advisor (Opus; Fable pin unavailable) methodology + Plan-agent code-reuse map both landed and CONVERGE. Methodology: 2x2 microstructure taxonomy TOXICITY(vpin q75) x LIQUIDITY(rel_spread q75) = {BENIGN,TOXIC}x{TIGHT,WIDE}, NOT a directional axis (corpus: microstructure predicts STATE not direction); dossier mirrors the existing quantile-encoded contract + feed_synthetic_flag/depth_liveness honesty fields; clock = activity bars (~M5-M15); redefined L2 sample floor (n_bars>=500, n_episodes>=5 over >=5 calendar days, n_events>=100/cell, depth_liveness>=0.5); crypto IN as a separate OHLCV-proxy stratum (Corwin-Schultz/Amihud/EDGE) OUT of any edge claim; falsification = INCONCLUSIVE-not-NEGATIVE when starved + cross-cell K_eff/DSR/pFDR multiple-testing control + synthetic-feed discount. Architecture: Loop-A orchestration shell reuses ~verbatim; the dossier builder (phase5/regime_stats.py) + pre-flight (phase5/run_proposal subprocess is D1/H4-hardwired) FORK; the L2 feature/adapter tooling (l2_adapter, intraday_features, intraday_bars, osr_intraday, run_osr_validation) reuses verbatim; proposal.py REGIME_IDS/PRIMARIES/known_feature_registry must become bar|l2 profile-aware (rejects L2 out of the box). Two firewall walls reproduced (Wall A dossier-lexical, Wall B holdout allowed_days). SEQUENCING DECISION: B0199 feasibility probe is a HARD GATE before the 8-file fork (given B0184 event-starvation, the most likely outcome is single-digit events/cell -> documented-negative Best-Tech deliverable, so do not fork 8 modules first). 8 build tasks B0198-1..8 enumerated in the spec, gated on B0199=GO.

BLOCKED by the B0199 gate = NO-GO (0/8 cells clear; max 11 events/cell vs 100 floor; depth axis partly a pricer artifact at 0.66-0.68 agreement). The 27-day synthetic hackathon L2 cannot populate even one microstructure regime cell to power, and we have NO crypto L2 at all (only Binance OHLCV). Per the probe ruling, the 8-file fork (B0198-1..8) is NOT to proceed; verdict INCONCLUSIVE not NEGATIVE. The full design (spec 2026-06-19-loop-a-on-l2-microstructure-design.md) + B0199 documented negative already constitute the Best-Tech 'loop generalizes' artifact. Reopen ONLY with a real (non-synthetic) L2 feed + materially more days (Tardis crypto ~$300 / LMAX FX-metals enterprise -- both post-hackathon, CEO-declined for now). Status pending CEO ruling on: stop+package negative / crypto-OHLCV-proxy probe / build-machinery-anyway-for-Best-Tech.

BOTH feasibility gates NO-GO -> the Loop-A-on-L2 premise is decisively falsified on every asset class we can test. B0199 (FX/metals synthetic L2): NO-GO on starvation (0/8 cells, <=11 events vs 100 floor) + synthetic-depth artifact (0.66-0.68 agreement). B0200 (crypto OHLCV, 12 months): NO-GO on novelty/fidelity despite ALL 12 cells clearing the floor (vol axis redundant with the bar Loop-A; liquidity/Amihud axis non-informative; OHLCV-proxy != microstructure; no L2 artifact check; zero transfer per B0188). Hypothesizer ticks were NOT run -- the gates correctly stopped before manufacturing false signals on regimes the data cannot support. DELIVERABLE = the two-asset-class documented negative (spec + B0199 + B0200 + 2 verdict notes + 15 green tests + 6 reused pipeline modules) as the Best-Tech 'AI research loop that generalizes AND knows when to stop honestly' artifact. EPIC STAYS BLOCKED: reopen ONLY with real (non-synthetic) L2 + materially more days (Tardis crypto ~$300 / LMAX FX-metals enterprise; both post-hackathon, CEO-declined). B0198-1..8 NOT forked. Pending CEO: keep-blocked vs discard, and whether to fold the negative into the Best-Tech decks.
